mapper.select:
SELECT /* rcpSelfSuffMapper.getRcpMgmtListSelfSuffDtl */ A.REQUEST_KEY , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID) AS AGENT_NAME , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9004', A.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS REQ_BUY_NM , A.OPER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9001', A.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_NAME , A.SERVICE_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0013', A.SERVICE_TYPE) AS SERVICE_NAME , A.ON_OFF_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', NVL(A.ON_OFF_TYPE, '0')) ON_OFF_NM , A.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER , MDL.MNFCT_ID , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', ( SELECT MNFCT_NM FROM ORG_MNFCT_MST WHERE MNFCT_ID = MDL.MNFCT_ID ), '') AS MNFCT_NM , ( SELECT MNFCT_NM FROM ORG_MNFCT_MST WHERE MNFCT_ID = USIM.MNFCT_ID ) AS USIM_MNFCT_NM , A.REQ_USIM_SN AS OLD_USIM_SN , A.SPC_CODE , C.SOC_CODE , FN_GET_RATENM(C.SOC_CODE) AS SOC_NAME , A.CSTMR_TYPE , B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN , B.CSTMR_TEL_MN , B.CSTMR_TEL_RN , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS CSTMR_TEL , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS CSTMR_MOBILE , B.CSTMR_POST , B.CSTMR_ADDR , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , B.CSTMR_MAIL , TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SYS_RDATE , FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM , TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM , A.PROD_NM AS DRCT_MNGM_PRDC_NM /* 직영상품명 */ , A.RES_NO /* 예약번호 */ , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD') REQ_IN_DT /* 신청일자 */ , B.CSTMR_NAME /* 고객명 */ , B.CSTMR_NAME AS CSTMR_NAME2 , C.SESPLS_PROD_ID /* 단말ID */ , MDL.PRDT_CODE AS PRDT_CODE /* 단말코드 */ , MDL.PRDT_NM AS MODEL_NAME /* 단말명 */ , NVL(FN_GET_CODENM ('CMN0044', MDL.PRDT_COLR_CD), A.REQ_MODEL_COLOR) AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR /* 단말색상 */ , A.REQ_PHONE_SN /* 단말일련번호 */ , C.HNDSET_SALE_PRICE /* 출고가 */ , NVL(C.CARD_TOT_DC_AMT,0) AS CARD_DC_AMT /* 즉시할인 */ , NVL(C.USE_POINT,0) AS USE_POINT /* 포인트 */ , TO_NUMBER(C.HNDSET_SALE_PRICE) - TO_NUMBER(NVL(C.CARD_TOT_DC_AMT,0)) - TO_NUMBER(NVL(C.USE_POINT,0)) AS TOT_AMT /* 결제금액 */ , A.MEMO AS REQUEST_MEMO /* 메모 */ , APD.REQUEST_STATE_CODE AS PHONE_STATE_CODE /* 단말진행상태 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0006', APD.REQUEST_STATE_CODE) PHONE_STATE_NAME /* 단말진행상태명 */ , USIM.PRDT_NM AS USIM_NAME /* 유심모델 */ , USIM.PRDT_CODE AS USIM_ID /* 유심제품명 */ , A.REQ_USIM_SN /* 유심번호 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2035', A.USIM_KINDS_CD) AS USIM_KINDS_NM , A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE AS USIM_STATE_CODE /* 유심진행상태 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0006', A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE) AS USIM_STATE_NAME /* 유심진행상태명 */ , D.DLVRY_NAME /* 배송받는분 */ , D.DLVRY_TEL_FN , D.DLVRY_TEL_MN , D.DLVRY_TEL_RN , D.DLVRY_TEL_FN||D.DLVRY_TEL_MN||D.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS DLVRY_TEL , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN||D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN||D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS DLVRY_MOBILE , D.DLVRY_POST /* 우편번호 */ , D.DLVRY_ADDR /* 주소 */ , D.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL /* 상세주소 */ , D.DLVRY_MEMO /* 요청사항 */ , E.TB_CD /* 유심택배사 */ , E.DLVRY_NO /* 유심택배사 송장번호 */ , APD.TB_CD AS PHONE_TB_CD /* 단말택배사 */ , APD.DLVRY_NO AS PHONE_DLVRY_NO /* 단말택배사 송장번호 */ , A.PSTATE /* 신청서상태 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0005', A.PSTATE) PSTATE_NAME /* 신청서상태명 */ FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP C , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D , MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP E , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , CMN_INTM_MDL USIM , NMCP_REQUEST_APD_STATE@DL_MCP APD /* 단말진행상태 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND C.SESPLS_PROD_ID = MDL.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.REQ_USIM_NAME = USIM.PRDT_CODE(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = APD.REQUEST_KEY AND A.PROD_TYPE = '04'
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ORDER BY A.REQUEST_KEY DESC
SELECT DTL_CD AS TB_CD FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'PERCEL' AND DTL_CD_NM = TRIM(#{tbNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT DECODE(STE.DLVRY_NO, NULL, DLY.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN||DLY.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN||DLY.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN, 'N') FROM NMCP_REQUEST_APD_STATE@DL_MCP STE , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP DLY WHERE STE.REQUEST_KEY = DLY.REQUEST_KEY AND RES_NO = #{resNo}

SELECT DECODE(STE.DLVRY_NO, NULL, DLY.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN||DLY.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN||DLY.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN, 'N') FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP STE , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP DLY WHERE STE.REQUEST_KEY = DLY.REQUEST_KEY AND RES_NO = #{resNo}
